description: Have fun choosing from a collection of ankle length shoes from gas. Comfy and stylish, this pair is worth adding in your wardrobe as it is a perfect lifestyle footwear when teamed with jeans and tees. Upper Suede for structural comfort Central lace-up system for a snug and customised Fit Midsole Eva midsole for responsive cushioning and shock absorption Cushioned and removable footbed for all-day comfort and to accomodate an orthotic Brand badge on the side for style Outsole TPR outsole for maximum durability, grip and traction shoe care Do not store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
